text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Today's the last day of summer camp...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And there isn't much time left before the Kikuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho... Sakura Chiyono O and Mejiro
Ardan will be sitting out because of their injuries.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo won't be running either. She mentioned
that long-distance races are not really her domain
and that she needs to train more before taking on
a G1.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: As for other potential competitors...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oh! That's...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Oh, it's you, Yaeno. Need something?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: There's something I'd like to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What's up?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Will you be running in the Kikuka Sho?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho? ...No. I'll be running in the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: The autumn Tenno Sho?! But why?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's where Tama's running.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You mean Tamamo?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I want to run against Tama. And I want to
beat her.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
She said she'd like to run against me too. That's
why I decided to run in it with her.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're running in the Kikuka Sho, right? After the
Satsuki Sho and the Japanese Derby, the Kikuka
Sho's the last of the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Indeed.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Creek's running in the Kikuka Sho. She has
incredible endurance, so make sure you give it
everything you've got.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah... I will.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The bags are packed and I'm ready to head home.
There's still a little time before I'm supposed to
meet up with Yaeno Muteki, but I find her at the
entrance already waiting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She appears to be deep in thought, with a
conflicted look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, Trainer. I spoke with Oguri a little earlier.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
She mentioned that Creek will be running in the
Kikuka Sho.
choice_data_list: Ah, so her injury must have healed.
Ah, so her injury must have healed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek, like Yaeno Muteki, is in her classic
year of the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has the makings of a stayer and was hoping
to win the Japanese Derby before an injury
forced her to withdraw.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
So Super Creek is entering the long-distance
Kikuka Sho. And rumor has it she's a stayer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: She'll certainly make for a formidable opponent.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
She may appear gentle and laid-back, but I can't
afford to underestimate her.
choice_data_list: Right. Let's devise a proper strategy.
Right. Let's devise a proper strategy.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yes, please.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We solidify our vision for the Kikuka Sho, and
summer camp draws to a close.
